title: Delightfully Devilish (Programmer Art Farmer's Delight Addons)
description: Makes the textures of a few Farmer's Delight Addons fit in with Programmer Art (Specifically the continuation project) (Dungeons Delight, Farmer's Respite, Wither Storm Delight, ect) Uses programmer art textures from Reminiscence (BBali and DrBruhMoments)
body:
[ORIGINAL PROGRAMMER ART FARMER'S DELIGHT TEXTURES](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/farmers-delight-programmer-art) BY drbruhmoments & bbali FROM THE [REMINISCENCE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/reminiscence) TEAM
ANY TEXTURES FROM POST 1.12 VERSIONS ARE FROM [PACP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp)

[FARMER'S DELIGHT - PROGRAMMER ART](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/farmers-delight-programmer-art) is REQUIRED! PUT IT UNDERNEATH THIS PACK!
(Farmer's Delight - Programmer Art by drbruhmoments & bbali)

Edits a few farmer's delight addons to fit in with the programmer art art style
Also contains slight edits to the knives from the Farmer's Delight Programmer Art pack, as they didnt fit in with some of the other textures

Farmer's Delight - Programmer Art assets used with permission (Proof of Permission in images)

Monster Cake Specifically is an edit of the cake from 4Jstudio's Halloween mashup pack , and the liquid in the cauldron is the mashup pack's lava texture


### PROGRESS:
- [Farmer's Respite](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-respite):
  - Blocks: 100%
  - Items: 95%
- [Dungeons Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons_delight):
  - Blocks: 80%
  - Items: 40%
  - Entities: 50%
- [Lava Java](https://modrinth.com/mod/lava-java):
  - Items: 0%
  - Entities: 100%
- [Some Assembly Required](https://modrinth.com/mod/some-assembly-required):
  - Blocks: 100%
  - Items: 75%
  - Entities: 0%
- [Wither Storm Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wither-storm-delight):
  - Blocks: 75%
  - Items: 75%
- [Fast Food Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastfood-delight-unofficial):
  - Blocks: 100%
  - Entities: 25%
  - Items: 40%
- [Quark Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark-delight):
  - Blocks: 100%
  - Items: 25%
